The '''''Borealis''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] cruiser captained by [[Ioa]], it served as the flagship for [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during her secret diplomatic mission to [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]. It, along with its escort, the ''[[Adamantine]]'', was infected by the [[Death Seed]] plague in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]. The ''Borealis'' was lost with all hands.

*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
